Prompt
U
Oracle Events
1. Search CRM for Mosaic deals using crm_search_deals (dealname: "Mosaic"). Results include: (a) deal_mosaic_okoye_apr2026_risk - damage claim for Zara Okoye relocation, prototype Unit #1 ($90K) with cracked servo motor housing and 4+ degree calibration drift, $50K vendor liability cap, $40K uncovered gap, Blessing Okafor signed off remotely from Philadelphia, delivery signed by intern Kyle Britten; (b) deal_mosaic_hartley_apr2026 - Deshawn Hartley Tampa→Denver, $1,520, hard deadline April 19 for Automate 2026 trade show, vendor Swift Relocations, coordinator Suki Patel; (c) deal_mosaic_q2 - Andre Washington, $4,500, closedwon.
2. Search CRM engagements for Mosaic history using crm_list_engagements (filtered by company_ids: ["company_mosaic"] or similar). Results include engagement_mosaic_damage_incident_041526 with the full chain-of-custody timeline (Heartland crew April 14 7:30 AM, Blessing's remote digital signature ~9:45 AM, loading completed ~10:00 AM, overnight stop unconfirmed, delivery April 15 ~9:15 AM signed by intern Kyle Britten), and engagement_mosaic_apr2026_relocation_wave showing April overview with 3 new relocations (Okoye $2,700, Hartley $1,520, Tanaka $2,770) and 6 total active.
3. Search Airtable for Deshawn Hartley using airtable_search_records (field_name: "Name", value: "Deshawn Hartley"). Result: recDeshawnHartleyTampaDenver - Tampa→Denver, Status: In Progress, dates April 14–19, coordinator Suki Patel, hard deadline for Automate 2026 trade show, standard household goods, furnished 1BR near downtown Denver preferred.
4. Search Airtable for Andre Washington using airtable_search_records (field_name: "Name", value: "Andre Washington"). Relocation result: recReloc00000009 - Detroit MI→Atlanta GA, Status: Completed. Stipend results: $1,200 standing desk (auto-approved in error, over $800 Mosaic cap), $350 coworking membership (auto-approved in error, coworking excluded from Mosaic policy), $89 ergonomic keyboard (duplicate receipt hash, status: Pending Approval).
5. Search QuickBooks for Mosaic billing using quickbooks_search_invoices (criteria: Mosaic-related) and quickbooks_search_bills (criteria: Mosaic or damage-related). Results: INV-2026-0411 ($9,010 for 3 April relocations - Okoye, Hartley, Tanaka), CM-2026-0415 (credit memo, -$90,000 for prototype damage claim), bill_mosaic_damage_accrual_001 ($90,000 pending liability accrual with $50K vendor coverage cap and $40K uncovered exposure).
6. Search emails for Tamara correspondence and damage details using search_emails (query: "Tamara Byrd" or "prototype" or "damage" or "Zara Okoye"). Results include: Zara Okoye's initial damage report to Tamara (cracked servo motor, 4+ degree drift on Unit #1), Tamara's formal damage notification to Emeka requesting resolution within 48 hours, Emeka's immediate response committing to a full incident report within 48 hours, and Tamara's earlier relocation requests for Deshawn Hartley and Keiko Tanaka.
7. Search Slack for damage and Mosaic discussions using conversations_search_messages (search_query: "Mosaic" or "damage" or "prototype"). Results include: Emeka's high-severity escalation in #operations (C006), Chloe's chain-of-custody timeline and delivery receipt investigation (intern Kyle Britten signed, not Zara), Blessing's admission of remote sign-off from Philadelphia, Hana's accounting entries (CM-2026-0415 credit memo and $90K liability accrual), Marcus's financial exposure analysis ($50K coverage cap, $40K gap, worst-case scenarios).
8. Search Linear for Mosaic tickets using linear_list_issues (query: "Mosaic" or "Washington"). Results: Andre Washington tickets #325 (apartment search, in_progress), #326 (flight booking, todo), #327 (moving coordination, todo). Note: Airtable shows Andre's relocation as Completed but Linear tickets remain open - status discrepancy indicating a communication gap. Also finds DOT compliance tickets for Keiko Tanaka.
9. Look up contact emails using contacts_search_contacts (queries: "Tamara Byrd", "David Chen"). Results: tamara.byrd@mosaicrobotics.com, david.chen@moveops.com.
10. Log comprehensive CRM engagement notes using crm_create_engagement on a Mosaic Robotics deal. Content covers: damage claim status ($90K prototype, $40K uncovered gap, pending insurance, Blessing's remote sign-off as root cause), Deshawn Hartley on track for April 19 hard deadline, Andre Washington's Airtable shows Completed but Linear tickets still open creating a communication/perception gap, and stipend issues flagged.
11. Schedule call with Tamara using calendar_add_calendar_event (title: "Mosaic Account Review - Emeka & Tamara" or similar, attendees: emeka.diallo@moveops.com, tamara.byrd@mosaicrobotics.com, scheduled for this week).
12. Send holding email to Tamara using send_email (sender: emeka.diallo@moveops.com, recipients: tamara.byrd@mosaicrobotics.com). Content acknowledges her concerns about the damage claim, Deshawn's Automate deadline, and Andre's move updates; promises detailed answers within 48 hours; mentions the scheduled call.
13. Brief David in #customer-engagement using conversations_add_message (channel_id: C002). Content flags that the Mosaic account needs leadership attention - $90K damage claim with $40K uncovered gap, Deshawn's April 19 hard deadline, Andre communication gap, and context that Mosaic is the newest client (~2 months) with damage exposure exceeding ~10x their total invoice revenue.
